Bindings.Binding: tD_Temp.isEnabled = not tD_Temp.isEnabled if (tD_Temp.isEnabled) then DEFAULT_CHAT_FRAME:AddMessage(tD_Loc.activated) else DEFAULT_CHAT_FRAME:AddMessage(tD_Loc.deactivated) end mobileSnacksUpdate() mobileSnacksOSD_OnUpdate()

tD_Temp.isVisible = not tD_Temp.isVisible mobileSnacksSettings:Show() mobileSnacksSettingsBtn:LockHighlight() mobileSnacksTradeControl:Show() mobileSnacksTradeControlBtn:LockHighlight(); mobileSnacksMessages:Hide() mobileSnacksUpdate() mobileSnacksOSD_OnUpdate()
tD_CharDatas.OSD.isEnabled = not tD_CharDatas.OSD.isEnabled mobileSnacksUpdate() mobileSnacksSettings_OnUpdate() mobileSnacksOSD_OnUpdate()
